zh.Wantage, Vale of the White Horse distric: 英國英格蘭波克夏望塔
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Edmund Childrey於1325年出生在英國波克夏爾德時，他的父親Henry Childrey55歲，母親Alice Rampayn33歲。他於大約1349年與Lucy Frethorne結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1372年4月14日在他的家鄉享年47歲，埋葬在英國波克夏爾德。

zh-hans.Wantage, Vale of the White Horse distric: 英国英格兰波克夏望塔
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Edmund Childrey于1325年出生在英国波克夏爾德时，他的父亲Henry Childrey55岁，母亲Alice Rampayn33岁。他于大约1349年与Lucy Frethorne结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1372年4月14日在他的家乡享年47岁，埋葬在英国波克夏爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Childrey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Childrey in Oxfordshire, which is named for Childrey Brook. This is probably ‘stream (Old English rīth) of Cilla (masculine) or Cille (feminine)’, but the first element could alternatively be Old English cille ‘spring’. The surname has died out in England.

nameMeanings.name: Edmund
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + mund ‘protector’. It was borne by several early royal and saintly figures, including a 9th-century king of East Anglia killed by invading Danes, allegedly for his adherence to Christianity. In the 16th and 17th centuries, there was a good deal of interchange between Edmund and Edward.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Edmund Childrey was born in 1325, in Childrey, Berkshire, England, his father, Henry Childrey, was 55 and his mother, Alice Rampayn, was 33. He married Lucy Frethorne about 1349. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 14 April 1372, in his hometown, at the age of 47, and was buried in Childrey, Berkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Edmund Childrey est né en 1325, à Childrey, Berkshire, Angleterre, son père, Henry Childrey, avait 55 ans et sa mère, Alice Rampayn, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Lucy Frethorne environ 1349. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 14 avril 1372, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 47 ans, et a été enterré à Childrey, Berkshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Edmund Childrey 1325 in Childrey, Berkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry Childrey 55 und seine Mutter Alice Rampayn 33. Er hat um 1349 Lucy Frethorne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 14. April 1372 im Alter von 47 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Childrey, Berkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Edmund Childrey è nato il nel 1325 nel Childrey, Berkshire, England, il suo padre, Henry Childrey, aveva 55 anni e il suo madre, Alice Rampayn, aveva 33 anni. Lui sposato Lucy Frethorne circa 1349. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 14 aprile 1372, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 47 anni, e fu sepolto a Childrey, Berkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Edmund Childreyが1325年にイギリスバークシュアイアチルドリーで生まれた時，父Henry Childreyは55歳，母Alice Rampaynは33歳であった。約1349年にLucy Frethorneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1372年4月14日に故郷で47歳で死去し，イギリスバークシュアイアチルドリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Edmund Childrey(이)가 1325년 영국 버크실르 치드리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry Childrey(은)는 55세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Rampayn(은)는 33세였다. 그는 대략 1349년 Lucy Frethorne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1372년 4월 14일 그의 고향에서 47세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 버크실르 치드리에 묻혔다.

mn.Wantage, Vale of the White Horse distric: Wantage, Bearrucscīr, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Edmund Childrey nasceu em 1325, em Childrey, Berkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Henry Childrey, tinha 55 anos e sua mãe, Alice Rampayn, tinha 33 anos. Ele casou-se com Lucy Frethorne aproximadamente 1349. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 14 de abril de 1372, em sua cidade natal, com 47 anos, e foi sepultado em Childrey, Berkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Edmund Childrey родился в 1325 г. в местности чаилдри, биркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Henry Childrey было 55 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Rampayn, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Lucy Frethorne около 1349 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 14 апреля 1372 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 47 лет и был похоронен в местности чаилдри, биркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Edmund Childrey nació en 1325, en Childrey, Berkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Henry Childrey, tenía 55 años y su mamá, Alice Rampayn, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Lucy Frethorne aproximadamente 1349. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 14 de abril de 1372, en su pueblo, a la edad de 47 años, y fue sepultado en Childrey, Berkshire, Inglaterra.
